ZAKIWhy ZAKIContactJoin now
Experimental public beta

Personal AI Operator.

ZAKI is the public beta for persistent personal intelligence: a trainable agent layer with context that does not reset between sessions, per-user memory, and visible work phases. When the work needs structure and execution, you move into Spaces.

Join the betaTry Spaces nowRead the FAQ

Quota

5 msgs / 24h

State

Public beta

Billing

Subscriptions later

Runtime

Nullalis

personal operator / trainable beta

What it is

An OpenClaw-inspired SaaS agent with persistent memory, visible work phases, and a more controlled product shape users can actually trust and train over time.

How it works with Spaces

ZAKI handles the continuity layer and the long-running relationship. When the job turns into writing, research, or organized execution, you move into Spaces so each project keeps its own clean context.

Why it is experimental

ZAKI is experimental by design. It is our public test of persistent personal intelligence: memory continuity, visible work phases, and per-user context that does not reset every time you start over.

What this includes

  • Persistent thread and memory continuity
  • Visible process phases while it works
  • A trainable operator layer built for daily working context
  • Free and limited during public beta; premium subscriptions come later
  • 5 free messages every 24 hours

Powered by Nullalis

Nullalis is the private runtime behind ZAKI. It gives the product continuity, memory discipline, and agentic capability without turning the public product into a fragile demo.

Persistent per-user sessions
Durable memory and runtime state
Process visibility through live streaming updates
Multitenant safety, trainability, and deployment discipline

Early access

Try ZAKI during beta

The beta includes 5 messages every 24 hours — free while we learn what works, limited enough to stay honest about what is still experimental. Paid subscriptions start after this phase.

5 messages / 24hWe use this only to contact you about ZAKI beta access.

Spaces for structured work now. ZAKI for testing persistent personal intelligence in public.
